$comment: Canonical MCP entries installed by install.sh. The telemetry MCP is intentionally NOT listed here — it has its own installer at neuraflash/nf-telemetry-installer that users must run separately. Add general-purpose MCPs (context7, gdrive, lucid, atlassian, salesforce-dx, etc.) here. All entries are stdio; remote HTTP MCPs are wrapped via the mcp-remote proxy so the installer stays transport-agnostic.

gdrive.description: Google Drive — list, search, read files. First-time setup: run `npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-gdrive auth` to OAuth-authorize, then set GDRIVE_CREDENTIALS_PATH if the default location isn't used.

lucid.description: Lucidchart / Lucidspark — search docs, read items, create diagrams. OAuth handled by mcp-remote on first connect (browser pops open).

atlassian.description: Atlassian Remote MCP — Jira + Confluence. OAuth handled by mcp-remote on first connect (browser pops open).

salesforce-dx.description: Salesforce DX MCP — orgs, metadata, data, users, testing, devops. Requires the `sf` CLI installed and at least one authorized org (`sf org login web`). Uses DEFAULT_TARGET_ORG by default.

knowledge-base.description: NeuraFlash shared Knowledge Base — semantic search over indexed technical docs (PDF, DOCX, web, Google Docs). Backed by ChromaDB + Bedrock Titan V2 on a shared EC2 host. No local install needed; mcp-remote proxies the HTTP transport.
